---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="pp-hero">
  <div class="pp-site-label">Computer Vision · Deep Learning · Research</div>
  <h1 class="pp-title">Pixels &amp; Principles</h1>
  <p class="pp-tagline">First principles for computer vision. Paper-to-code walkthroughs.<br>Stories that make concepts stick — by Rahul Dev Singh.</p>
</div>

<div class="pp-series-grid">

  <a href="first-principles.html" class="pp-series-card">
    <div class="pp-card-tag tag-a">Series A</div>
    <div class="pp-card-title">First Principles</div>
    <div class="pp-card-desc">The things nobody explained but everyone assumes you know. Images, pixels, convolutions, normalisation — done properly.</div>
    <div class="pp-card-footer">
      <span class="pp-post-count">1 post</span>
      <span class="pp-card-arrow">→</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="ml-concepts.html" class="pp-series-card">
    <div class="pp-card-tag tag-b">Series B</div>
    <div class="pp-card-title">ML Concepts</div>
    <div class="pp-card-desc">Loss functions, overfitting, batch norm, attention — the machine learning ideas that power every modern CV system.</div>
    <div class="pp-card-footer">
      <span class="pp-post-count">Coming soon</span>
      <span class="pp-card-arrow">→</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="cv-algorithms.html" class="pp-series-card">
    <div class="pp-card-tag tag-c">Series C</div>
    <div class="pp-card-title">CV Algorithms</div>
    <div class="pp-card-desc">Edge detection, feature matching, segmentation, object detection — classical and modern algorithms built from scratch.</div>
    <div class="pp-card-footer">
      <span class="pp-post-count">Coming soon</span>
      <span class="pp-card-arrow">→</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="paper-to-code.html" class="pp-series-card">
    <div class="pp-card-tag tag-d">Series D</div>
    <div class="pp-card-title">Paper → Code</div>
    <div class="pp-card-desc">Research papers that changed CV, implemented clearly for graduate students. No MATLAB. No missing details. Just clean Python.</div>
    <div class="pp-card-footer">
      <span class="pp-post-count">Coming soon</span>
      <span class="pp-card-arrow">→</span>
    </div>
  </a>

  <a href="datasets.html" class="pp-series-card">
    <div class="pp-card-tag tag-e">Series E</div>
    <div class="pp-card-title">Data &amp; Datasets</div>
    <div class="pp-card-desc">COCO, ImageNet, annotation formats, dataset bias, augmentation — understanding your data before you train anything.</div>
    <div class="pp-card-footer">
      <span class="pp-post-count">Coming soon</span>
      <span class="pp-card-arrow">→</span>
    </div>
  </a>

</div>
```
